sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107114" key="u(pekxw/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεκχώρ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n107114.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">excretion by stool,</tr_> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg026:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg026:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
